---
title: "Test: Covariant Derivative"
cadabra-deps:
    - "tests/test_covariant_derivative.cdb"
    - "tests/test_adm_kinematics.cdb"
---

```{python}
from tools.print_latex import print_latex
from pathlib import Path

root_path = Path().cwd() / "results"
```

If the pipeline works, this should output the covariant derivative of the tensor $T^b{}_c$ in terms of the partial derivative and the Christoffel symbols.

```{python}
print_latex(root_path / "test_covariant_derivative" / "test_covariant_derivative.tex")
```

```{python}
replace_gamma3 = lambda s: s.replace(r"\GammaThree", r"{}^{(3)}\Gamma")
print_latex(root_path / "test_adm_kinematics" / "test_adm_kinematics.tex", preprocess=replace_gamma3)
```
